title: FMD - Using Play Button when only one earbud is connected
scenario: Find My Device Play button sends tone to connected earbud when only one earbud is connected
steps: Pair both earbuds with the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → Find My Device.
Verify the device is recognized and displayed on the map/list.
Disconnect one earbud (e.g., left earbud) by placing it in the charging case or turning it off.
Tap the Play button next to the connected earbud (right earbud).
Observe the "Sending tone..." message displayed on screen.
Verify an animated Stop button and an illustration are shown during tone playback.
Tap the Stop button to stop the tone.
Reconnect the previously disconnected earbud and disconnect the other earbud (right earbud).
Repeat steps 5–8 for the now-connected earbud (left earbud).
expected: The Play button triggers a tone on the connected earbud only. The app displays a "Sending tone..." message with an animated Stop button and illustration. The tone stops when the Stop button is tapped. The same behavior occurs when the other earbud is disconnected.
